svg.title: Library circulation trends
svg.desc: Small-multiple circulation trend charts covering 2026-04-01 through 2026-04-30. The export includes active loans, overdue loans, daily checkouts, and daily returns.
svg.text: Daily circulation analytics for a recruiter-friendly portfolio artifact, exported from the SQLite CLI without opening the database manually.

g.title: Active loans
g.desc: Daily active loans from 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-30. Peak value 3, latest value 2.

g.title: Overdue loans
g.desc: Daily overdue loans from 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-30. Peak value 1, latest value 1.

g.title: Checkouts started
g.desc: Daily checkouts started from 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-30. Peak value 1, latest value 0.

g.title: Returns completed
g.desc: Daily returns completed from 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-30. Peak value 1, latest value 0.
